label: Thing category
description: Defines a category node used to group ThingDefs in stockpile filters, resource readouts, trade/caravan transfer views, and other thing-selection UI.

parent.label: Parent
parent.description: Parent ThingCategoryDef in the category tree. Omit for root-level categories such as Root and standalone category roots.

iconPath.label: Icon path
iconPath.description: Texture path loaded for the category icon after XML load. Used by visible category roots and some resource readout categories.

resourceReadoutRoot.label: Resource readout root
resourceReadoutRoot.description: If true, this category can act as a root grouping in the resource readout UI.

basic-category.label: Basic category
basic-category.description: A category with a label and optional parent category.
